mapper.select: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(o.total_amount), 0) AS gmv, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN o.completed = 1 THEN o.actual_amount ELSE 0 END), 0) AS net_revenue, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN o.status = 'DISPATCHING' THEN o.total_amount ELSE 0 END), 0) AS cod_outstanding, COALESCE(SUM(o.delivery_fee), 0) AS delivery_fee_total, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN o.status = 'REJECTED' THEN o.delivery_fee ELSE 0 END), 0) AS rejection_cost, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN o.completed = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS completed_orders FROM sales_order o WHERE o.deleted = 0 AND o.create_time >= #{from} AND o.create_time < #{to}

SELECT COALESCE(SUM((i.qty - i.reject_qty) * sp.wholesale_price), 0) FROM sales_order o JOIN sales_order_item i ON i.order_id = o.id AND i.deleted = 0 JOIN supplier_product sp ON sp.id = i.supplier_product_id WHERE o.deleted = 0 AND o.completed = 1 AND o.create_time >= #{from} AND o.create_time < #{to}
SELECT o.status AS status, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM sales_order o WHERE o.deleted = 0 AND o.create_time >= #{from} AND o.create_time < #{to} GROUP BY o.status

SELECT COALESCE(SUM(i.reject_qty), 0) AS reject_qty, COALESCE(SUM(i.qty), 0) AS total_qty FROM sales_order o JOIN sales_order_item i ON i.order_id = o.id AND i.deleted = 0 WHERE o.deleted = 0 AND o.create_time >= #{from} AND o.create_time < #{to}

SELECT AVG(TIMESTAMPDIFF(HOUR, o.dispatch_time, o.sign_time)) FROM sales_order o WHERE o.deleted = 0 AND o.dispatch_time IS NOT NULL AND o.sign_time IS NOT NULL AND o.create_time >= #{from} AND o.create_time < #{to}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM raw_order r WHERE r.deleted = 0 AND r.order_date >= #{from} AND r.order_date < #{to}

SELECT COALESCE(c.name, '未分类') AS name, COALESCE(SUM(i.actual_amount), 0) AS amount FROM sales_order o JOIN sales_order_item i ON i.order_id = o.id AND i.deleted = 0 JOIN supplier_product sp ON sp.id = i.supplier_product_id LEFT JOIN category c ON c.id = sp.category_id AND c.deleted = 0 WHERE o.deleted = 0 AND o.completed = 1 AND o.create_time >= #{from} AND o.create_time < #{to} GROUP BY sp.category_id, c.name ORDER BY amount DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT COALESCE(b.name, '未知品牌') AS name, COALESCE(SUM(i.actual_amount), 0) AS amount FROM sales_order o JOIN sales_order_item i ON i.order_id = o.id AND i.deleted = 0 JOIN supplier_product sp ON sp.id = i.supplier_product_id LEFT JOIN brand b ON b.id = sp.brand_id AND b.deleted = 0 WHERE o.deleted = 0 AND o.completed = 1 AND o.create_time >= #{from} AND o.create_time < #{to} GROUP BY sp.brand_id, b.name ORDER BY amount DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT COALESCE(s.name, '未知供应商') AS name, COALESCE(SUM(ap.total_amount), 0) AS amount FROM actual_purchase_order ap LEFT JOIN supplier s ON s.id = ap.supplier_id AND s.deleted = 0 WHERE ap.deleted = 0 AND ap.create_time >= #{from} AND ap.create_time < #{to} GROUP BY ap.supplier_id, s.name ORDER BY amount DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT MAX(i.product_name) AS name, i.product_code AS code, COALESCE(SUM(i.qty), 0) AS qty, COALESCE(SUM(i.actual_amount), 0) AS revenue, COALESCE(SUM(i.reject_qty), 0) AS reject_qty FROM sales_order o JOIN sales_order_item i ON i.order_id = o.id AND i.deleted = 0 WHERE o.deleted = 0 AND o.create_time >= #{from} AND o.create_time < #{to} GROUP BY i.product_code ORDER BY revenue DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT COALESCE(SUM(st.quantity * sp.wholesale_price), 0) AS inventory_value, COUNT(DISTINCT st.supplier_product_id) AS sku_count, COALESCE(SUM(st.quantity), 0) AS total_units FROM inventory_stock st JOIN supplier_product sp ON sp.id = st.supplier_product_id WHERE st.deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) AS open_po_count, COALESCE(SUM(po.total_amount), 0) AS open_po_amount FROM purchase_order po WHERE po.deleted = 0 AND po.status = 'PENDING_PAYMENT'

SELECT DATE(o.create_time) AS day, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN o.completed = 1 THEN o.actual_amount ELSE 0 END), 0) AS revenue, COUNT(*) AS orders FROM sales_order o WHERE o.deleted = 0 AND o.create_time >= #{from} AND o.create_time < #{to} GROUP BY DATE(o.create_time) ORDER BY day
